GenAI Usage

The broad majority of the sample responded that they use GenAI multiple times a week (n=13[38.2%]) or multiple times a day (n=14[41.2%]).
Frequencies for GenAI Usage
genai_usage_frequency n Percent
Einmal monatlich 3 8.8
Einmal täglich 3 8.8
Mehrmals die Woche 13 38.2
Mehrmals im Monat 1 2.9
Mehrmals täglich 14 41.2

Survey Based on UTAUT2

Constructs

Given the small sample size (N=34), the UTAUT2 was not modeled to see which constructs predicted behavioral intention. Only one respondent said in the open-ended questions that they do not have use for GenAI. When asked how often they use GenAI, every participant in the sample reported using it at least once a month. It is therefore logical to assume a high degree of acceptance of GenAI among this sample. Descriptive statistics below appear to support this. The Habit construct is notably lower than the others suggesting participannts did not view themselves as having a GenAI habit.
Descriptive Statistics for Constructs
variable mean median sd min max
pe_mean 5.245098 5.333333 0.7121307 3.000000 6
ee_mean 4.066177 4.250000 1.1731026 1.250000 6
si_mean 3.480392 3.000000 0.9955834 2.000000 6

bi_mean 5.127451 5.000000 0.9175238 2.333333 6
